turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hi jerry , how is jerry doing ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: hi , good to see the doctor .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: good to see jerry as well . um , so the doctor knows that the nurse told jerry about dax . the doctor would like to tell dax about jerry .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: sure .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: jerry is a 54 year old male with a past medical history , significant for osteoporosis and multiple sclerosis who presents for an annual exam . so jerry , what's been going on since the last time the doctor saw jerry ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: uh , jerry and other people have been traveling all over the country . the traveling all over the country has been kind of a stressful summer . jerry has been kinda adjusting to everything in the fall and so far everything in the fall has been good , but ah , lack of sleep , the lack of sleep has been really getting to jerry .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . and has jerry taken anything for the insomnia . has jerry tried any strategies for the insomnia .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: jerry've tried everything from melatonin to meditation to , uh , t- stretching out every morning when jerry get up . nothing really seems to help though .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . in terms of jerry's osteoporosis , the doctor knows the doctor have jerry on fosamax , any issues with jerry's joints , any issues like-

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: no broken bones recently ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: no , nothing like broken bones recently ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . and then in terms of jerry's multiple sclerosis , when was the last time jerry saw the neurologist ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: uh , about six months ago .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay and jerry's taking the medication ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . and any issues with the medication ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: none whatsoever .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: and any additional weakness ? the doctor knows jerry was having some issues with jerry's right leg , but the issues with jerry's right leg seems to have improved or ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes a lingering issue with jerry's knee surgery . but other than the lingering issue with jerry's knee surgery it's been fine .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: pretty , pretty strong , n- nothing , nothing out of the ordinary .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right , well the doctor knows jerry did a review of systems sheet when jerry checked in .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: and jerry were endorsing that insomnia . any other issues , chest pain , shortness of breath , anything ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right . well lets go ahead and do a quick physical exam .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey dragon , show the doctor the vital signs . so jerry's vital signs here in the office they look really good . the doctor'm just going to listen to jerry's heart and lungs and let jerry know what the doctor find .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: sure .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . on physical examination everything looks good . the doctor know jerry's lungs are nice and clear . jerry's heart sounds good . the doctor know jerry do have some weakness of jerry's lower extremities . the right lower extremity is about 4 out of 5 , the left lower extremity is about 3 out of 5 . but jerry reflexes are really good so the doctor'm , the doctor'm encouraged by jerry reflexes . and jerry do have some , the doctor know , arthritic changes of jerry's right knee .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: um , so let's go over some of jerry's results , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: sure .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey dragon , show the doctor the right knee x-ray . and here's the x-ray of jerry's right knee , which shows some changes from arthritis , but otherwise the x-ray of jerry's right knee looks good . so let's talk a little bit about the doctor's assessment and plan . from an osteoporosis standpoint , the doctor will go ahead and order , the doctor know , re- continue on the fosamax . does jerry need a refill on fosamax ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: actually jerry do .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey dragon , order a refill of fosamax 1 tab per week , 11 refills . and then in t- , for jerry's second problem , jerry's multiple sclerosis the doctor want jerry to go ahead and continue to see the neurologist and continue on those medications . and let the doctor know if jerry need anything from the multiple sclerosis standpoint , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: the doctor got it .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: any questions ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: not at this point , no .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , great . hey dragon , finalize the note .

tried for insomnia; nothing really seems to help

Lingering issue related to knee surgery; otherwise fine.
